name: US.GDPTotal
Title: Gross domestic product: Total and per capita, current and constant (2020) prices, annual
Keywords: Total GDP, per capita, nominal, real
Author: UNCTAD
Notes:
Description:
This table provides information on gross domestic product (GDP), total and per capita at current and constant (2020) prices.
The total GDP is expressed in millions of US dollars, while GDP per capita is expressed in US dollars.

Sources:
- UN DESA Statistics Division, National Accounts Main Aggregates Database
- UNCTAD secretariat estimates
 
Notes:
GDP data at current prices in US dollars are converted from GDP in national currency using annual period-average exchange rates.
 
GDP data in constant prices in US dollars are converted from GDP in national currency using the annual period-average exchange rate of the base year for all years.
 
Per capita GDP is defined as GDP at current prices in US dollars divided by the total population.
